subtitle.en: Begonia pavonina has iridoplasts — modified chloroplasts with stacked thylakoid lamellae acting as a photonic crystal — they reflect blue while still doing photosynthesis under deep-shade conditions
subtitle.ko: Begonia pavonina의 iridoplast — 적층 thylakoid가 광결정으로 작용해 청색 반사하면서 깊은 그늘에서 광합성

description.en: Leaf swatch with optional iridescent spots. Toggle on/off the iridoplast structure to compare appearance. Photonic structure that boosts shade-adapted photosynthesis.
description.ko: 잎 swatch + iridescent 점. 토글로 iridoplast 비교. 음지 광합성을 부스트하는 광결정 구조.
